query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE assignedTo = u.id) as tasks_assigned,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE createdBy = u.id) as tasks_created,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotations WHERE createdBy = u.id) as quotations_created,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE createdBy = u.id) as projects_created,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reminders WHERE createdBy = u.id) as reminders_created
FROM users u
WHERE u.email LIKE '%test%' OR u.email LIKE '%bulk%'
LIMIT 5;
